3. See error

What actually happened. Include the full output or error message if applicable.

Paste output or error here

## Environment

| Field              | Value |
|--------------------|-------|
| Python version     | e.g. 3.12.0 |
| OS                 | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 / Windows 11 |
| schemaguard version | e.g. 0.1.0 |

Add any other context about the problem here (schema files, migration files, git diff output, etc.).
